title: Yuusei String Lights Remote Controlled, 100FT/30M Festoon Lights Outdoor Waterproof IP45, 50+2 Shatterproof G40 Bulbs, 2500K Warm White for Garden, Yard, Wedding, Patio, Terrace, Party
features: 【Connectable】150 bulbs can be connected in series at the same time.（strings of the same type） Then all the series can be adjustable with remote, including brightness, modes and timing. Easily link and control all string lights with our connectable outdoor lights.

【Remote Controller Included】No more hassle of reaching for switches to adjust the garden lights. Our remote control provides effortless and convenient operation, allowing you to easily adjust the brightness, timing and modes of the led lights.
【IP45 Waterproof & Shatterproof】Our remote controlled outdoor light is made of waterproof and shatterproof materials, ensuring long-lasting performance even in challenging weather conditions.
【Create a Cozy Atmosphere】The 2500K warm white color temperature provides a cozy and inviting atmosphere that adds warmth and comfort to any environment, such as parties, weddings, and festivals.

【Exceptional Customer Service】We offer a one-year warranty on our festoon lights, ensuring that you have a worry-free experience. Our dedicated customer service team is always ready to assist you with any concerns or questions you may have.
